name: L'hootz F'tadjeen
recipeIngredient: 1 lb White fish, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer all ingredients in a dish.
2. Pour the hot olive oil over the ingredients.
3. Top with the pimento.
4. Simmer slowly for approximately 3/4 hour without mixing.
5. Serve hot, with drops of lemon juice.
